title: equisetum lechleri
intro: Equisetum lechleri, also known as Masticharia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the horsetail family and is native to the Andes mountains in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum lechleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. Equisetum lechleri is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
